;*** Start embedded assembler ***

	AREA ||.rev16_text||, CODE
	THUMB
	EXPORT |__asm___9_bsp_spi_c_8a704174____REV16|
#line 492 "../Drivers/CMSIS/Include/cmsis_armcc.h"
|__asm___9_bsp_spi_c_8a704174____REV16| PROC
#line 493

 bx lr
	ENDP
	AREA ||.revsh_text||, CODE
	THUMB
	EXPORT |__asm___9_bsp_spi_c_8a704174____REVSH|

|__asm___9_bsp_spi_c_8a704174____REVSH| PROC
#line 508

 bx lr
	ENDP
	AREA ||.rrx_text||, CODE
	THUMB
	EXPORT |__asm___9_bsp_spi_c_8a704174____RRX|
#line 694
|__asm___9_bsp_spi_c_8a704174____RRX| PROC
#line 695

 bx lr
	ENDP

;*** End   embedded assembler ***
